summary: Iteration 43: Comprehensive testing of Pending Approvals feature. All 13 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend verified with 6 tabs working correctly. Financial operations (Income/Expenses, Loans, Loan Repayments, PSP Settlements) now route through pending approvals instead of executing immediately.

issues: Console warning: span cannot be child of select/option - hydration error warning (non-blocking, existing issue from previous iteration)
Console warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent (accessibility warning, non-blocking)

passed_tests: POST /api/income-expenses creates entry with status='pending' (NOT immediately affecting treasury)
POST /api/income-expenses/{entry_id}/approve approves and executes treasury operations
POST /api/loans creates loan with status='pending_approval' (NOT immediately deducting treasury)
POST /api/loans/{loan_id}/repayment creates repayment with status='pending_approval' (NOT immediately crediting treasury)
POST /api/loan-repayments/{repayment_id}/approve approves, credits treasury, updates loan totals
POST /api/psp/{psp_id}/settle-batch creates settlement with status='pending' (NOT immediately crediting treasury)
GET /api/pending-approvals/all returns all pending items grouped by type with correct counts
DELETE /api/income-expenses/{entry_id} does NOT reverse treasury for pending entries (correct behavior)
AccountantDashboard frontend shows 6 tabs: Transactions, Vendor Settlements, Income/Expenses, Loans, Repayments, PSP Settlements
AccountantDashboard approve/reject buttons work with captcha verification
Sidebar badge shows pending approval counts
critical_code_review_comments: Income/Expenses creation correctly sets status='pending' and defers treasury operations to approval step
Loan creation correctly sets status='pending_approval' and defers treasury deduction to approval step
Loan repayment creation correctly sets status='pending_approval' and defers treasury credit to approval step
PSP batch/net settlement correctly sets status='pending' and defers treasury credit to approval step
GET /api/pending-approvals/all correctly aggregates all pending items with counts
AccountantDashboard correctly displays 6 tabs with approve/reject functionality and captcha verification
seed_data_creation: Created test income/expenses, loans, loan repayments, and PSP settlements during testing (prefixed with TEST_)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pending Approvals feature fully implemented and tested. All financial operations (Income/Expenses, Loans, Loan Repayments, PSP Settlements) now route through pending approvals. AccountantDashboard has 6 tabs. Treasury operations only execute upon approval. Login uses 'access_token' field. API returns paginated responses for some endpoints (e.g., pending-transactions returns {items: [], total, page, page_size, total_pages}).
